name: agent-q-framework
description: A repeatable, tool-agnostic framework for building projects with AI coding agents
author: Safqore

/q:plan.description: Start a structured planning session with reverse elicitation

/q:execute.description: Execute a build plan with deviation rules and atomic commits

/q:verify.description: Verify completed work against the build plan and quality standards

/q:review.description: Run a structured code review on recent changes or a full codebase

/q:debug.description: Start a scientific method debugging session

/q:quick.description: Apply a small, focused fix without full planning overhead

/q:orchestrate.description: Run the full multi-agent pipeline (plan, execute, verify, debug)

/q:spinjitsu.description: Launch parallel execution of multiple build plans

/q:ingest.description: Ingest video/audio content for Agent Q context
